docs.text: Welcome to MicroBit Camp! 🚀 Welcome to our interactive course where we'll learn how to code with the BBC Micro:bit! Course Lessons Hero Pet Course - Build your very own digital pet! Get ready to code, build, and have fun!
docs.title: Course Home

docs.text: Welcome to our interactive course where we'll learn how to code with the BBC Micro:bit!
docs.title: Welcome to MicroBit Camp! 🚀

docs.text: Hero Pet Course - Build your very own digital pet! Get ready to code, build, and have fun!
docs.title: Course Lessons

docs.text: 🎉 Congratulations! You have completed the Hero Pet course! Over the last two sessions, you have: 1. Built a digital pet using the Micro:bit LED screen and buttons. 2. Animated your pet and created an interactive feeding game. 3. Added smart environmental sensors to let your pet feel light, temperature, and touch. 4. Created a complex survival game with decaying stats. You are now a true Micro:bit Pet Creator ! Keep experimenting and building amazing things!
docs.title: Congratulations

docs.text: You have completed the Hero Pet course! Over the last two sessions, you have: 1. Built a digital pet using the Micro:bit LED screen and buttons. 2. Animated your pet and created an interactive feeding game. 3. Added smart environmental sensors to let your pet feel light, temperature, and touch. 4. Created a complex survival game with decaying stats. You are now a true Micro:bit Pet Creator ! Keep experimenting and building amazing things!
docs.title: 🎉 Congratulations!

docs.text: 💻 Step 1: Meet the Microbit 🌟 What's New? Before we start coding, we need to meet our new digital friend! The Microbit is a tiny computer that will become the body of your pet. It has special parts that let us interact with it. 🛠️ What to Do Take a look at your Microbit and find these special parts: * Buttons (A and B): We can use these to feed our pet or play with it! * LED Screen: The 25 little lights where we will draw our pet's face. * Sound: Our pet will be able to make cute noises through the speaker! * Touch Logo: The gold logo on the front can feel when you touch it! Leave a screenshot or photo of the Microbit parts here: 🏆 Challenge! Can you find the reset button on the back of the Microbit? Try pressing the A and B buttons. Do they click?
docs.title: Module 1 - Meet the Microbit

docs.text: Before we start coding, we need to meet our new digital friend! The Microbit is a tiny computer that will become the body of your pet. It has special parts that let us interact with it.
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.text: Take a look at your Microbit and find these special parts: * Buttons (A and B): We can use these to feed our pet or play with it! * LED Screen: The 25 little lights where we will draw our pet's face. * Sound: Our pet will be able to make cute noises through the speaker! * Touch Logo: The gold logo on the front can feel when you touch it! Leave a screenshot or photo of the Microbit parts here:
docs.title: 🛠️ What to Do

docs.text: Can you find the reset button on the back of the Microbit? Try pressing the A and B buttons. Do they click?
docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: 🎨 Step 2: Make Your Pet Face 🌟 What's New? Every pet needs a face! We are going to use the show leds block to turn on specific lights to draw your pet. 🛠️ What to Do Choose your pet: Is it a dog, a cat, a bunny, or a space alien? Give it a fun name! Draw the face: Go to your code toolbox and find the Basic category. Grab the show leds block and drag it inside the on start block. Click the little squares to draw your pet's face! The white squares will light up. Leave a screenshot of your pet's face code here: 🏆 Challenge! Can you make your pet look like your favorite animal? Try turning all the lights on and off to see what happens!
docs.title: Module 2 - Make Your Pet Face

docs.text: Every pet needs a face! We are going to use the show leds block to turn on specific lights to draw your pet.
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.text: Choose your pet: Is it a dog, a cat, a bunny, or a space alien? Give it a fun name! Draw the face: Go to your code toolbox and find the Basic category. Grab the show leds block and drag it inside the on start block. Click the little squares to draw your pet's face! The white squares will light up. Leave a screenshot of your pet's face code here:
docs.title: 🛠️ What to Do

docs.text: Can you make your pet look like your favorite animal? Try turning all the lights on and off to see what happens!
docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: ✨ Step 3: Animate Your Pet 🌟 What's New? A real pet moves around, right? We are going to use a forever loop to make our pet blink or smile continuously! 🛠️ What to Do Grab another show leds block from the Basic toolbox. Put it right below your first face block. Draw the face again, but change the eyes so they look closed! Grab a pause (ms) block from the Basic toolbox and put it between the faces to slow down the blinking. Put all these blocks inside the forever block so your pet blinks all the time! Leave a screenshot of your animation blocks here: 🏆 Challenge! Can you add a 3rd step to your animation so your pet winks or sticks its tongue out? Try changing the pause time to make your pet blink super fast or super slow!
docs.title: Module 3 - Animate Your Pet

docs.text: A real pet moves around, right? We are going to use a forever loop to make our pet blink or smile continuously!
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.text: Grab another show leds block from the Basic toolbox. Put it right below your first face block. Draw the face again, but change the eyes so they look closed! Leave a screenshot of your animation blocks here:

docs.text: Can you add a 3rd step to your animation so your pet winks or sticks its tongue out? Try changing the pause time to make your pet blink super fast or super slow!
docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: 💖 Step 4: Add Pet Feelings 🌟 What's New? Pets have feelings too! We are going to use the Input blocks to change how our pet feels when we press buttons. 🛠️ What to Do Let's add three feelings: Happy, Hungry, and Sleepy! Feeling Happy 😊: Go to the Input toolbox and grab the on button A pressed block. Add a show icon block inside and pick the Happy Face! Feeling Hungry 🤤: Grab the on button B pressed block. Add a show leds block and draw an open mouth for food! Feeling Sleepy 😴: Grab another on button A pressed block. Click the little arrow next to "A" and change it to "A+B". Add a show icon block and pick the Sleeping Face! Leave a screenshot of your feeling blocks here: 🏆 Challenge! Make your pet show an Angry face if you shake it! Add a new feeling using the on logo touched block!
docs.title: Module 4 - Add Pet Feelings

docs.text: Pets have feelings too! We are going to use the Input blocks to change how our pet feels when we press buttons.
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.text: Let's add three feelings: Happy, Hungry, and Sleepy! Feeling Happy 😊: Go to the Input toolbox and grab the on button A pressed block. Add a show icon block inside and pick the Happy Face! Feeling Hungry 🤤: Grab the on button B pressed block. Add a show leds block and draw an open mouth for food! Feeling Sleepy 😴: Grab another on button A pressed block. Click the little arrow next to "A" and change it to "A+B". Add a show icon block and pick the Sleeping Face! Leave a screenshot of your feeling blocks here:
docs.title: 🛠️ What to Do

docs.text: Make your pet show an Angry face if you shake it! Add a new feeling using the on logo touched block!
docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: 🚀 Step 5: Smart Pet Upgrade 🌟 What's New? Now let's make our pet even smarter with sounds and movement sensors! The Microbit can feel when it is shaken, dropped, or tilted. 🛠️ What to Do Shake to Wake: Pets love to sleep! Let's wake them up by shaking. Go to the Input toolbox and grab the on shake block. Add a show icon block with a Surprised Face! Sounds: Let's add a cute noise when they wake up! Go to the Music toolbox and grab a play sound block. Put it inside your on shake block! Leave a screenshot of your smart upgrade code here: 🏆 Challenge! Try different sounds in the Music category. Which one fits your pet best? Can you make your pet giggle when you touch its logo?
docs.title: Module 5 - Smart Pet Upgrade

docs.text: Now let's make our pet even smarter with sounds and movement sensors! The Microbit can feel when it is shaken, dropped, or tilted.
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.text: Shake to Wake: Pets love to sleep! Let's wake them up by shaking. Go to the Input toolbox and grab the on shake block. Add a show icon block with a Surprised Face! Sounds: Let's add a cute noise when they wake up! Go to the Music toolbox and grab a play sound block. Put it inside your on shake block! Leave a screenshot of your smart upgrade code here:

docs.text: Try different sounds in the Music category. Which one fits your pet best? Can you make your pet giggle when you touch its logo?
docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: 🍎 Step 6: Feed Your Pet Game 🌟 What's New? Let's make a game where you feed your pet to get a high score! We will use a Variable to keep track of your points. 🛠️ What to Do Make a Score: Go to the Variables toolbox and click Make a Variable . Name it Score . Set the Score to Zero: Grab the set score to 0 block and put it in your on start block. Gain Points: Whenever you feed your pet (like pressing Button B), let's get a point! Grab the change score by 1 block and put it in your on button B pressed block. Show Your Score: Grab the show number block from the Basic toolbox. Put your Score variable block inside it. Put this at the end of your feed button code! Leave a screenshot of your feeding game code here: 🏆 Challenge! Make it so you lose a point if you shake the pet while it's eating! Can you add a winning sound if your score reaches 10?
docs.title: Module 6 - Feed Your Pet Game

docs.text: Let's make a game where you feed your pet to get a high score! We will use a Variable to keep track of your points.
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

Leave a screenshot of your feeding game code here:

docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: 🌟 Step 7: Showcase Time! 🌟 What's New? Awesome work, Pet Creator! It’s time to show off your hard work to your friends and see what they have built. 🛠️ What to Do Find a partner and trade Microbits. Play with their pet and let them play with yours. Did they use different feelings? What was their highest score in the feeding game? Leave a photo of you and your friends playing with your pets here: 🏆 Challenge / Reflection! Before we finish, think about these 3 questions: What was the most fun part about making your pet? What block was the trickiest to use, and how did you figure it out? If you could add any crazy feature to your pet next time, what would it be? Great job today! 🎉
docs.title: Module 7 - Showcase Time!

docs.text: 🌡️ Step 3: Temperature Mood Pet 🌟 What's New? Just like us, pets get hot in the summer and cold in the winter. We will use the Temperature sensor to change our pet's mood based on the weather! 🛠️ What to Do Use another if / else if / else block. Rules: If temperature is high (e.g., > 30) → show tired/hot face 🥵 Else if temperature is low (e.g., < 20) → show cold/shivering face 🥶 Otherwise → show normal face 😊 Leave a screenshot of your temperature code here: 🏆 Challenge! Try It: Hold the Micro:bit tightly in your hands to warm it up. Does the face change? Find a cold place (like near a window or an AC) and test the cold face!
docs.title: Module 10 - Temperature Pet

docs.text: Just like us, pets get hot in the summer and cold in the winter. We will use the Temperature sensor to change our pet's mood based on the weather!
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.text: 📳 Step 4: Shake to Wake 🌟 What's New? If your pet is sleeping, you can gently shake it to wake it up! We will use the Shake sensor to trigger an animation and sound. 🛠️ What to Do When the Micro:bit is shaken ( on shake block): * Open eyes 👀 * Play a jump animation (show a few different faces) * Play a happy sound 🎵 Leave a screenshot of your shake code here: 🏆 Challenge! Make the jump animation look super cool! Add a different sound if you shake it while it's already awake.
docs.title: Module 11 - Shake to Wake

docs.text: If your pet is sleeping, you can gently shake it to wake it up! We will use the Shake sensor to trigger an animation and sound.
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.text: Make the jump animation look super cool! Add a different sound if you shake it while it's already awake.
docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: 🤚 Step 5: Touch to Feed 🌟 What's New? We used buttons to feed our pet before, but now we can use the Touch Logo ! It feels like giving your pet a little pat on the head. 🛠️ What to Do Use the on logo touched block from the Input toolbox. When the logo is touched: * Show food 🍎 (using LEDs) * Increase happiness ❤️ * Play a happy sound Leave a screenshot of your touch feed code here: 🏆 Challenge! Make the pet eat the food with a short chewing animation! What happens if you hold the logo instead of just touching it?
docs.title: Module 12 - Touch to Feed

docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: 📊 Step 6: Add Pet Needs 🌟 What's New? Real pets have needs! They get hungry, sad, and tired. We will create Variables to track your pet's life stats. 🛠️ What to Do Go to the Variables toolbox and create three new variables: 1. Hunger 2. Happiness 3. Energy In your on start block, set each of them to 5: * Hunger = 5 * Happiness = 5 * Energy = 5 Leave a screenshot of your variable setup here: 🏆 Challenge! What happens if you start them at 10 instead? Or 0?
docs.title: Module 13 - Add Pet Needs

docs.text: Real pets have needs! They get hungry, sad, and tired. We will create Variables to track your pet's life stats.
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.text: Go to the Variables toolbox and create three new variables: 1. Hunger 2. Happiness 3. Energy In your on start block, set each of them to 5: * Hunger = 5 * Happiness = 5 * Energy = 5 Leave a screenshot of your variable setup here:
docs.title: 🛠️ What to Do

docs.text: What happens if you start them at 10 instead? Or 0?
docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: ⏳ Step 7: Survival System 🌟 What's New? Now we need to make those needs change over time. As time passes, your pet will naturally get hungry and lose energy! 🛠️ What to Do Inside a forever loop, add a pause block for a few seconds (e.g., 3000 ms). Every few seconds: * Hunger goes down by 1 ( change Hunger by -1 ) * Energy goes down by 1 ( change Energy by -1 ) Check the stats using if blocks! If values get too low (e.g., less than 2): * Show a Sad face 😢 * Show a Sleepy face 😴 * Show an Angry face 😠 Leave a screenshot of your survival loop code here: 🏆 Challenge! Make your pet cry (play a sad sound) if its happiness hits 0!
docs.title: Module 14 - Survival System

docs.text: Now we need to make those needs change over time. As time passes, your pet will naturally get hungry and lose energy!
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: ❤️ Step 8: Keep Your Pet Alive 🌟 What's New? Now that your pet has needs, YOU have to take care of it! Let's connect the player actions to the pet's stats so you can keep it alive. 🛠️ What to Do Update your previous code to change the variables: * Touch logo = feed pet 🍔 ( change Hunger by 1 ) * Shake = wake pet/play ⚡ ( change Happiness by 1 ) * Rest in dark = regain energy 🌙 ( change Energy by 1 ) Leave a screenshot of your updated interaction code here: 🏆 Challenge! What happens if you overfeed your pet (Hunger goes above 10)? Add an if block to make it sick! 🤢
docs.title: Module 15 - Keep Your Pet Alive

docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.title: 🛠️ What to Do

docs.text: What happens if you overfeed your pet (Hunger goes above 10)? Add an if block to make it sick! 🤢
docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: 🕵️ Step 9: Secret Bonus Mode 🌟 What's New? Every great game has a secret! Let's create a hidden action that only YOU know about. 🛠️ What to Do Create a secret code using the inputs. Here are some ideas: * Press A+B+B+A = Rainbow mode 🌈 * Shake 3 times = Dance mode 💃 * Touch Logo + Button A = Super Pet ⭐ (Max out all stats!) Leave a screenshot of your secret mode code here: 🏆 Challenge! Don't tell your friends your secret code! Let them try to guess it during Showcase Time.
docs.title: Module 16 - Secret Bonus Mode

docs.text: Every great game has a secret! Let's create a hidden action that only YOU know about.
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.text: Create a secret code using the inputs. Here are some ideas: * Press A+B+B+A = Rainbow mode 🌈 * Shake 3 times = Dance mode 💃 * Touch Logo + Button A = Super Pet ⭐ (Max out all stats!) Leave a screenshot of your secret mode code here:
docs.title: 🛠️ What to Do

docs.text: Don't tell your friends your secret code! Let them try to guess it during Showcase Time.
docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: 🏆 Step 10: Final Challenge & Showcase 🌟 Final Challenge: Save Your Hero Pet! Can your pet survive for 60 seconds? Your project must include: ✅ 2 sensors ✅ 2 variables ✅ Animation ✅ Feeding system ✅ Win or lose condition Pick your difficulty: * 🟢 Easy Mode: Keep pet alive for 30 seconds. * 🟡 Normal Mode: Keep pet alive for 60 seconds. * 🔴 Hard Mode: Pet loses hunger faster (every 1 second!). 🌟 Showcase Time Walk around and try your friends’ pets. See if you can keep theirs alive! Give feedback and vote on: * 🎨 Most Creative * 🧠 Smartest Pet * 😂 Funniest Pet * 🏆 Best Survivor 🤔 Reflection Answer these 3 questions: 1. Which sensor was your favourite to use? 2. What was hardest to code? 3. What would you add next time? 🚀 Bonus Upgrades Finished early? Try adding: * Levels 📈 * Pet battle mode ⚔️ * Radio pet multiplayer 📡 * More emotions 😍😡😴 * Pet evolution 🐉 Well Done! You turned a simple pet into a smart interactive creature using code and sensors. 🚀
docs.title: Module 17 - Final Challenge

docs.text: Can your pet survive for 60 seconds? docs.text: 🤖 Step 1: Meet the Sensors 🌟 What's New? Great job building your Hero Pet! 🎉 Today, you will upgrade your pet into a smart digital companion that can react to the real world using Micro:bit sensors. Your Micro:bit can sense the world around it just like we do! It can detect light, temperature, movement, and touch. 🛠️ What to Do Let's find the sensors we will use today: * 🌞 Light Level: The LED screen can also act as a light sensor! * 🌡️ Temperature: The Micro:bit has a built-in thermometer. * 📳 Shake Movement: The accelerometer detects when it is moved. * 🤚 Touch Logo: The gold logo on the front is a touch sensor. Leave a screenshot or photo of the sensors here: 🏆 Challenge! Find out where the temperature sensor is located on the Micro:bit! Try covering the LED screen with your hand. Does it get darker?
docs.title: Module 8 - Meet the Sensors

docs.text: Great job building your Hero Pet! 🎉 Today, you will upgrade your pet into a smart digital companion that can react to the real world using Micro:bit sensors. Your Micro:bit can sense the world around it just like we do! It can detect light, temperature, movement, and touch.
docs.title: 🌟 What's New?

docs.text: Let's find the sensors we will use today: * 🌞 Light Level: The LED screen can also act as a light sensor! * 🌡️ Temperature: The Micro:bit has a built-in thermometer. * 📳 Shake Movement: The accelerometer detects when it is moved. * 🤚 Touch Logo: The gold logo on the front is a touch sensor. Leave a screenshot or photo of the sensors here:
docs.title: 🛠️ What to Do

docs.text: Find out where the temperature sensor is located on the Micro:bit! Try covering the LED screen with your hand. Does it get darker?
docs.title: 🏆 Challenge!

docs.text: 🌞 Step 2: Light Sensor Pet 🌟 What's New? Pets need their sleep! We will use the Light Level sensor and an if block to make our pet sleep when it is dark. 🛠️ What to Do Use an if / else block from the Logic toolbox. Rules: If light level is low (less than 50) → pet sleeps 😴 (show sleeping face) Else (if light level is bright) → pet wakes 😊 (show happy face) Leave a screenshot of your light sensor code here: 🏆 Challenge! Try It: Cover the Micro:bit with your hand. What happens? Change the number 50 to something else. How dark does it need to be for your pet to sleep?
docs.title: Module 9 - Light Sensor Pet
